data.body: CLOSE-GATE ROOT CAUSE: completion-verifier reads the MAIN checkout (/Users/joeoakhart/rebar via the .tickets-tracker symlink), NOT this worktree — so pre-land it sees origin/main (lacking all my changes) and reports every AC unmet. => land-then-close is required (skill early-land pattern). Audited all 9 ACs vs actual worktree impl: only REAL codebase gap is 4001's forward-rename test lacking the required fsck-clean assertion (added it, 9 lines). Amended 4001, rebased stack onto current origin/main (advanced twice; zero conflicts), re-pushed all 9 (changes 598-606 new patchsets; stale Verified votes cleared). Next: await LLM-Review+1 & Verified+1 on all 9 (this run also clears the 606 import-benchmark flake), then regression-safety-check + SUBMIT (land), then update main checkout + close tickets bottom-up (verifier now sees landed code) w/ CI-attestation comments for the make-test-pass criteria, then epic.
